summary: Create an estimate line item in the proposal

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description: Unique company identifier associated with the Procore User Account.

name.description: Display name of the line item.

group_id.description: Line item group ID. Omit or leave empty to use the default group.

cost_item.description: Cost item associated with the line item. Provide custom pricing or omit to use a generic cost item based on type. When provided, the entire cost item is replaced (no partial updates).

labor_factor.description: Labor difficulty factor applied to the cost item.

tag.description: Optional tag for filtering or grouping.
